entity.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol that began operating in 2021 as an AMM integrated with the Serum/OpenBook order-book ecosystem. Raydium remained active after a December 2022 pool-authority compromise and subsequently moved administrative authority to multisig controls.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for Raydium's Solana DEX, liquidity and launch products. The launch marker is year-level because the official documentation states that Raydium started in 2021 without asserting a stronger exact day.

events.title: Raydium began operating as a Solana AMM and DEX
events.description: Raydium began operation in 2021 as an automated market maker and decentralized exchange integrated with Solana's order-book liquidity infrastructure.
events.notes: Year-level marker; no exact day is asserted.

events.title: Compromised pool authority enabled a Raydium liquidity-pool exploit
events.description: A malicious actor gained control of Raydium Liquidity Pool V4's pool-owner authority and withdrew assets through fee-accounting instructions. Raydium revoked the compromised authority, deployed a mitigation and later moved authority controls to multisig infrastructure.
events.notes: This incident did not terminate the broader Raydium protocol.

evidence.title: What is Raydium
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that Raydium started as an AMM and DEX in 2021.

evidence.title: Raydium official application
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming continued operation.

evidence.title: Detailed Post-Mortem and Next Steps
evidence.notes: Primary postmortem describing the 2022-12-16 pool-authority compromise, exploit mechanics and mitigation.

evidence.title: Raydium attack vectors and historical admin-key incident
evidence.notes: Official security documentation records the December 2022 AMM v4 pool-authority compromise and post-incident multisig controls.

evidence.title: Raydium archived homepage index
evidence.notes: Archive index retained for historical website continuity.
